ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the country is located */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL of the country's flag image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the happiness score */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Happiness rank of the country */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the happiness score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the year */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy for the year */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score for the year */,
  "freedom_to_make_life_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices score for the year */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score for the year */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption score for the year */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual score for the year */,
  "confidence_interval_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "confidence_interval_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic score */,
  "economic_score" REAL /* Economic score contributing to happiness */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate for the year */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate for the year */,
  "income_inequality" REAL /* Income inequality score for the year */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_well_being" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family well-being factor record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the family score */,
  "family_score" REAL /* Family well-being score contributing to happiness */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate for the year */,
  "marriage_rate" REAL /* Marriage rate for the year */,
  "divorce_rate" REAL /* Divorce rate for the year */,
  "adolescent_birth_rate" REAL /* Adolescent birth rate for the year */,
  "child_mortality_rate" REAL /* Child mortality rate for the year */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_well_being_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health factor record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health score */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score contributing to happiness */,
  "life_expectancy_at_birth" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth for the year */,
  "infant_mortality_rate" REAL /* Infant mortality rate for the year */,
  "health_expenditure_per_capita" REAL /* Health expenditure per capita for the year */,
  "number_of_hospitals" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the country */,
  "number_of_doctors_per_1000_people" REAL /* Number of doctors per 1000 people */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom factor record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the freedom score */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Freedom score contributing to happiness */,
  "political_freedom_score" REAL /* Political freedom score for the year */,
  "civil_liberties_score" REAL /* Civil liberties score for the year */,
  "internet_freedom_score" REAL /* Internet freedom score for the year */,
  "press_freedom_score" REAL /* Press freedom score for the year */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trust_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trust factor record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trust score */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score contributing to happiness */,
  "corruption_perceptions_index" REAL /* Corruption Perceptions Index (CPI) for the year */,
  "government_trust_score" REAL /* Government trust score for the year */,
  "institutional_trust_score" REAL /* Institutional trust score for the year */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trust_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity factor record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the generosity score */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Generosity score contributing to happiness */,
  "donation_amount_per_capita" REAL /* Average donation amount per capita for the year */,
  "volunteer_rate" REAL /* Volunteer rate for the year */,
  "charitable_donations_gdp_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of GDP contributed to charitable donations */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dystopia_residuals" (
  "residual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dystopia residual record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the dystopia residual score */,
  "dystopia_residual_score" REAL /* Dystopia residual score contributing to happiness */,
  "dystopia_gdp_per_capita" REAL /* Dystopia GDP per capita for the year */,
  "dystopia_life_expectancy" REAL /* Dystopia life expectancy for the year */,
  "dystopia_social_support" REAL /* Dystopia social support score for the year */,
  "dystopia_freedom" REAL /* Dystopia freedom score for the year */,
  "dystopia_generosity" REAL /* Dystopia generosity score for the year */,
  "dystopia_trust" REAL /* Dystopia trust score for the year */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dystopia_residuals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the happiness score record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the access request */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Response time of the access request */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
